items.title: Hong Kong court jails media tycoon and British citizen Jimmy Lai for 20 years
items.description: Lai's supporters say this amounts to a death sentence, but authorities say it demonstrates the rule of law.

items.title: Eritrea accuses Ethiopia of fabricating report its troops had crossed the border
items.description: Ethiopia had alleged that Eritrean soldiers were on its territory and supporting rebels in the north.

items.title: Outrage as South Korean official suggests 'importing' foreign women to boost birth rate
items.description: Jindo county head Kim Hee-soo had suggested "importing young women from Vietnam or Sri Lanka" for young rural men.

items.title: Bad Bunny makes history as Trump criticises 'terrible' Super Bowl show
items.description: Puerto Rican artist Bad Bunny makes history with his entirely Spanish set on the sporting world's biggest stage.

items.title: 'Super exciting!' - Seahawks fans celebrate Super Bowl win
items.description: The Seattle team produced a devastating defensive display to beat the New England Patriots.
